title: Caught ...
content: Despite the fact that movie-making often envisions the future of technology, it still manages to goof-up with the current technology. In the latest episode of Eleventh Hour, the iPhone was used upside-down at least twice. I might be wrong. It might be an "eavesdropped-proof" version of the device put together by the secret service. :P Can't blame the actress though, since the iPhone feels almost the same on either side. No, I'm not taking side because she looks cute. ;)
